exhibits.name: List of State Administrators/Agents for Service of Process
exhibits.notes: Lists state agencies for franchise registration/disclosure states. States covered: California, Hawaii, Illinois, Indiana, Maryland, Michigan, Minnesota, New York, North Dakota, Rhode Island, South Dakota, Virginia, Washington, Wisconsin.

exhibits.name: Financial Statements
exhibits.notes: Audited financial statements by Forvis Mazars, LLP. Two sets: (1) FY2024 and FY2023 with auditor's report dated March 24, 2025; (2) FY2023 and FY2022 with auditor's report dated May 31, 2024. Clean opinions on both. Includes balance sheets, income statements, statements of member's equity, cash flows, and notes. OCR quality is degraded on some pages (character substitutions in scanned financial statement images).

exhibits.name: Franchise Agreement
exhibits.notes: Complete franchise agreement with 23 sections plus 8 sub-exhibits: (A) Protected Territory and Authorized Premises, (B) Acknowledgement of Opening, (C) Entity Ownership Addendum, (D) Lease Addendum, (E) Direct Payment Authorization, (F) General Release Agreement, (G) Non-Disclosure and Non-Competition Agreement, (H) Guaranty.

exhibits.name: Area Development Agreement
exhibits.notes: Area Development Agreement with 11 sections plus 2 sub-exhibits: (A) Development Area and Development Schedule, (B) Entity Information and Ownership Addendum. Governs multi-unit development rights.

exhibits.name: Operations Manual — Table of Contents
exhibits.notes: Table of contents only (108 pages in full manual, not included). Covers: Introduction, Franchise Relationship, Operational Brand Standards (4 zones, minimum hours, menu standards, recipes, food truck standards, service standards), franchise obligations/financial management. Version 03-01-2023.

exhibits.name: Current and Former Franchisee List
exhibits.notes: Contains PII (names, addresses, phone numbers of current and former franchisees). PII hard-blocked from public output. Three franchised locations ceased operations in 2024. Confidentiality clause: some franchisees signed agreements restricting ability to speak about experience.

exhibits.name: State Specific Addenda
exhibits.notes: Addenda for both Franchise Agreement and Area Development Agreement. States with addenda: California, Illinois, Indiana, Maryland, Michigan, Minnesota, New York, North Dakota, Rhode Island, South Dakota, Virginia, Washington, Wisconsin. Key overrides include: venue/choice of law modifications, release restrictions, noncompete limitations, termination/renewal protections, jury trial rights, transfer fee limitations.

exhibits.name: State Effective Dates
exhibits.notes: Lists states requiring FDD registration and their effective dates.

exhibits.name: Receipt Page
exhibits.notes: Dual receipt page. Franchise sellers listed: Dok Kwon and Mike Penn, both at Draper, UT office. Standard format.
